fields.Name: GetArtifactVersionsByID
fields.UserQuestion: What are the full artifact version records for a given set of artifact version IDs?
fields.Description: Returns artifact version fields (name, content mode, file ref, content, mime) joined with the parent artifact and artifact type (including ToolLibraryClass) for a supplied list of ArtifactVersionIDs.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Single-query replacement for AgentRunner.gatherConversationArtifacts per-junction loop that issued two Load() calls per row (MJ: Artifact Versions + MJ: Artifacts). Joins vwArtifactVersions → vwArtifacts → vwArtifactTypes so ToolLibraryClass is available without a third lookup. Accepts a JS array via {{ versionIds | sqlIn }}.
